technical_replicate: assayed the growth rate of the single-microconidium-propagated strains illustrated in Figure 2A by race tubes, in triplicate.
experimental_design: we screened strains with knockouts of putative histone demethylases for defects in H3K9 methylation or DNA methylation.
factor_value: we performed whole genome bisulfite sequencing (WGBS) on DNA from an LSD1 knockout strain (FGSC# 11964).
number_of_technical_replicates: assayed the growth rate of the single-microconidium-propagated strains illustrated in Figure 2A by race tubes, in triplicate.
